mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 成功绘制圆形并进入编辑模式，但在拖拽中心标记点时无法明确区分是圆形移动还是地图平移。且该 bug 需要 snappable=false 设置，默认 demo 页面未配置此选项，无法通过 UI 界面设置。超 80 步后停止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Attempted to drag center marker of circle in edit mode. Circle appeared to move but unclear if it was actual center marker drag or map pan. Bug requires snappable=false which is not set in the default demo.
